welcome: Welcome to Bitbucket MCP Server CLI
description: Command-line interface for the Bitbucket MCP Server
health_check_description: Check Bitbucket server health and connectivity
please_visit_url: Please visit the following URL to authorize
after_authorization: After authorization, you will receive a code that can be used to exchange for an access token
complete_oauth_setup: To complete OAuth setup, provide --client-id and --redirect-uri options
token_required: Token is required. Use --token option to provide the access token
server_url_invalid: Server URL must be a valid URL
auth_type_invalid: Authentication type must be oauth, token, or basic
client_id_required: Client ID is required for OAuth authentication
client_secret_required: Client Secret is required for OAuth authentication
access_token_required: Access token is required for token authentication
